steps.name: create-branch
steps.description: Create task/t0004_generate_target_tuning_curve branch from main and plan the step list.

steps.name: check-deps
steps.description: Verify task dependencies (task has none; run the verificator to confirm).

steps.name: init-folders
steps.description: Create mandatory task folder structure and seed empty directories with .gitkeep.

steps.name: research-papers
steps.description: Skipped: the functional form is given explicitly in the task description; no paper-level literature review is required to implement a synthetic cosine-like curve.

steps.name: research-internet
steps.description: Skipped: no external data sources needed. The task is purely analytical and self-contained.

steps.name: research-code
steps.description: Skipped: no prior task produced code, datasets, or libraries relevant to generating a synthetic tuning curve (t0001 is setup, t0002 and t0003 run in parallel).

steps.name: planning
steps.description: Write plan/plan.md covering code layout, generator parameters, dataset-asset schema, and verification criteria.

steps.name: setup-machines
steps.description: Skipped: task runs locally in seconds; no remote compute is needed.

steps.name: implementation
steps.description: Generate the canonical cosine tuning curve (mean + noisy trials), register the dataset asset, and save the target_tuning_curve.png plot.

steps.name: teardown
steps.description: Skipped: no remote machines were provisioned.

steps.name: creative-thinking
steps.description: Skipped: mechanical synthesis of a fixed analytical formula; no alternative approaches to explore within this task's scope.

steps.name: results
steps.description: Write results_summary.md, results_detailed.md, metrics.json, costs.json, remote_machines_used.json.

steps.name: compare-literature
steps.description: Skipped: the target curve is synthetic by design; there is no published baseline with the same parameters to compare against.

steps.name: reporting
steps.description: Run all verificators, capture sessions, flip task.json to completed.
